sections.summary: Game producer with live ops and data analytics focus.
sections.experience: Led live operations for a mobile game and improved D30 retention by 18 percent using SQL dashboards. Built monetization experiments and tracking for feature rollouts.
sections.skills: SQL, Looker, product analytics, telemetry design, stakeholder communication, no management experience in banking.

jd_corpus.title: Senior Game Producer
jd_corpus.text: Own live ops roadmap, analytics instrumentation, and cross-functional production. Strong SQL and telemetry experience required.

jd_corpus.title: Game Data Analyst
jd_corpus.text: Analyze product and monetization performance. Build dashboards in Looker and partner with producers on experiments.

jd_corpus.title: Live Service Producer
jd_corpus.text: Drive mobile game live service events, track KPI movement, and communicate impact to stakeholders.
